chats.title: do you have something in desert?
chats.content: Yessss🤩! We've got some delicious desserts for you 🍰! You can try our Mad-Tilda cake, Tease Cake, or Lotus cake 🎂. We also have shakes and beverages like Peanut Butter, Chocolate, and Lotus 🍦. Which one sounds good to you? 😋

chats.title: price?"
chats.content:
🤑 Prices for desserts:

Tease Cake: Rs. 845 🎂
Lotus cake: Rs. 797 🎂
Shakes: Rs. 645 - Rs. 795 🍦
